title: Configuring for Web Deployment on iSeries
breadcrumbs: Installing and Configuring Uniface on iSeries
Configuring for Web Deployment on iSeries
text: Configuring for Web Deployment on iSeries To set up a Uniface Web environment, you need to configure the various pieces of the Web Application Server architecture to work with each other. This is best accomplished by a configuration strategy in which you start with a basic configuration, add in the individual components, and test after each step to ensure that the components are working correctly with each other. It is assumed that you are familiar with the Uniface architecture and its components, the Web Request Dispatcher (WRD), and Web Services. The files you need have been installed in the IFS directory you specified during installation, under uniface/webapps/uniface . The following steps need to be accomplished in order to configure the WRD on the iSeries in your web server: Note: The following procedures apply to IBM Integrated Web application server for i. For WebSphere, the procedures are very similar. Configure the WRD and Create a wrd.war File on iSeries Create a New Application Server Install the WRD in the Application Server Start and Test the WRD Related Links Web Services A web service is software that makes its functionality available over the Internet.
